rationale: Educ. Code §37.205 governs school safety training programs and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not affect this statute.
quote: Sec. 37.205. SAFETY TRAINING PROGRAMS. The center shall conduct for school districts a safety training program that includes:
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption.
